name: Great Gratin of Potatoes (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Yukon gold potatoes or russet potatoes, peeled and cut into 1/16 to 1/8-inch thick slices
salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub an oval gratin dish or rectangular (14 x 8 inches) 2 quart gratin dish with garlic.
2. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees.
3. Arrange the potato slices in layers, overlapping as needed for a total of 3 layers in the gratin dish.
- For each layer: sprinkle with 1/2 teaspoon salt and pepper, half of the cheese, drizzle with 1 tablespoon cream, and dot with butter.
4. After the last layer, do not add additional cheese but dot with butter.
5. Pour chicken broth over the top.
6. Bake for 1 1/2 hours, basting the potatoes with the liquid accumulated in the bottom of the gratin dish at the midpoint of the baking time.
